Status: source library identified as candidate scholarly support; direct quotation requires exact passage review. Remaining gap: Need exact project-method and creativity passages. Raw filenames often append Nik_Murano and are not treated as authorship evidence. Catalogue rows are preferred for authors...
fields.plan: How this briefing says the vision should be accomplished, translated into a public project route. When to reach for this: designing or rebuilding a doctrine-writing / long-form-analysis environment; specifying what "lossless" must mean operationally for complex thought work; building a room that must survive adversarial revision. Entry point: README_START_HERE.md — prototype/index.html (for feel) — docs/01_room_vision_and_charter.md — docs/02_information_architecture.md — docs/05_engines_and_passes.md. Integration target: any downstream tool rendering prose from a room state (Atlas graph views, diff tools, export renderers, Council comparison UIs, Compiler pipeline for model-specific briefs). Wire or preserve the implementation files: prototype/index.html (15.3 KB), prototype/styles.css (13.2 KB), prototype/app.js — static interactive prototype demonstrating feel, not production implementation - wireframes/*.svg — 6 annotated desktop wireframes (overview, manuscript, council, atlas, evidence, furnace modes) - schemas/design_tokens.json — semantic design tokens - schemas/sample_room_state.json — sample serialized room-state
fields.status: Documented handoff or prototype; live status still to verify
fields.remaining_gaps: Promote the packet from documented handoff to live implementation only after the declared caveats are resolved: apply or wire the scaffold, run the stated validation or smoke-test sequence, and keep unresolved assumptions visible.
fields.detailed_source_vision: Functional name: Lossless Synthesis Room. Ceremonial name: Magnum Opus Scriptorium. This is the handoff for the flagship Murano OS chamber — a governed environment for the kinds of projects where losing a requirement, source, assumption, promise, or discarded branch would constitute a quiet catastrophe: long-form analysis, doctrine-writing, research synthesis, strategic reasoning, world-building documents, adversarial revision. Its thesis, given plainly in the charter: "The room should not merely contain work; it should govern work without losing requirements, sources, decisions, assumptions, or discarded branches." It is emphatically not a chat room or a note editor with side panels. It externalizes what complex thinkers try to hold in fragile internal memory — what the project is trying to do, what has been requested, what has been promised, which assumptions are currently active, which claims are verified / interpretive / speculative, which sources...

maintenance_rule: Update this blueprint before strengthening public claims on the website. Do not use word count, module count, or status percentage as a substitute for concrete project substance.
claim_ceiling_rule: Public claims may rise only when the built components, source use, status, and remaining gaps are updated here and reflected in the rendered page.

public_standard_check.Vision: This document supports the public account of Blueprint by preserving the project purpose, reader-facing claim, and professional-portfolio role.
public_standard_check.Mechanism: It connects source material, project components, implementation state, and next actions so the work can be inspected rather than merely asserted.
public_standard_check.What is built: The supporting evidence is the named page, blueprint, packet, project file, source record, or implementation page described in the document.
public_standard_check.Source use: Sources are used as method and source background, domain grounding, or project history; direct quotation and stronger factual claims require passage-level review.
public_standard_check.Plan: Bind claims to exact source anchors, visible implementation evidence, or a narrower public claim.
public_standard_check.Status: Current support record for the professional package unless explicitly marked archival.
public_standard_check.Remaining Gaps: Passage-level source check, implementation verification, citation cleanup, and proportional public wording remain open where evidence is incomplete.
